# SEO Ai Agent - Project Context

## Project Overview
**Name:** SEO Ai Agent
**URL:** https://seo-agent.net
**Primary Purpose:** A comprehensive, AI-powered SEO platform that combines rank tracking in 200+ countries with advanced AI content generation and automated publishing.

## Core Features & Capabilities

### 1. Global Rank Tracking
- **Multi-Country Tracking:** Track keyword positions in 200+ countries (e.g., Google US, Google DE, Google FR).
- **Competitor Analysis:** Automatically track and compare performance against 3 competitors.
- **Search Console Integration:** Direct integration with Google Search Console for official traffic data.

### 2. AI Content Generation
- **Advanced Models:** Utilizes GPT-5.2, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini 2.0.
- **SEO Optimization:** Content is auto-optimized for target keywords with a 100-point scoring system.
- **Human-Like Writing:** Designed to produce high-quality, engaging content that ranks.

### 3. MCP SEO Integration (Model Context Protocol)
- **ChatGPT & Claude Connection:** Connects SEO data directly to ChatGPT and Claude Desktop via MCP API.
- **Real-time Access:** Users can check rankings and generate content within their preferred AI chat interface.

### 4. CMS Publishing
- **WordPress Integration:** One-click publishing to WordPress sites.
- **Upcoming Platforms:** Shopify, Webflow, and Wix integration coming soon.

## Target Audience
- SEO Professionals and Agencies
- Content Marketers
- Business Owners looking for automated growth
- Developers integrating SEO data via MCP

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend:** Next.js (React), Tailwind CSS
- **Backend:** Node.js
- **Key Integrations:** Google Search Console API, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, MCP API

## Documentation & Links
- **Home:** https://seo-agent.net
- **MCP Integration:** https://seo-agent.net/mcp-seo
- **Login:** https://seo-agent.net/login
- **Register:** https://seo-agent.net/register
